<!-- Thank you for contributing to Agentic SDLC Personas. Fill each section. Remove sections that do not apply. -->

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing the change and the motivation -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New persona kit
- [ ] Update existing persona kit
- [ ] New or updated MCP catalog entry
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Translation (EN, PT-BR, ES)
- [ ] Site or build
- [ ] Other

## Scope

- [ ] Persona: `NN-slug`
- [ ] Locale: `en` / `pt-br` / `es` / `all`

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter (title, description, author, date, version, status) is present on every touched `.md` file
- [ ] Table of contents is numbered and matches section headings
- [ ] Previous / Next / Index navigation is present at top and bottom of every persona doc
- [ ] All hyperlinks use descriptive anchor text (no bare URLs)
- [ ] New MCPs follow the [MCP validation policy](../CONTRIBUTING.md#6-mcp-validation-policy) and are recorded in `docs/registry/mcp-catalog.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Local build passes: `cd site && npm run build`
- [ ] Validation script passes: `npm run validate`

## Related issues

Closes #
